title: HDS Requirement
description: A single mapped requirement in an HDS scope, expressed across the three-layer model: the Pryv platform layer (inherited, referenced), the HDS layer (authored), and the implementer layer (per-persona obligations).

text.description: Paraphrased requirement text. Do NOT redistribute copyrighted standards verbatim.

pryv_ref.description: ref of the inherited platform-layer row in the layered_on_pryv scope (vendor/pryv). Optional — set when Pryv's matrix covers this requirement.

implementer.description: What's still on the plate of whoever builds on HDS, one entry per persona.

hdsLayer.description: What HDS-as-operator + the HDS app stack adds on top of the platform layer.

effort_saved.description: How much of the requirement HDS carries for the implementer.

overview.description: 2-3 sentence position. Audience: auditor / compliance officer.

regions.description: Data-residency regions where this HDS claim holds. Omit if region-independent.

evidence.description: Proof for the HDS-layer claim. implemented/configurable require at least tests[] or ops[].

ops.description: Operational evidence: runbooks, monitoring conditions, deploy configs.

internal_docs.description: IDs of documents in the private compliance-internal repo.

overview.description: What this persona must still do themselves.

templates.description: ids of agreement templates (templates/<id>) this persona must sign for this row.
